examples: Obviously, changes destabilize us out of our comfort zone.
The market for credit derivatives, widely blamed for helping destabilize markets, remains vast.
If an individual file (or set of files) grows too large, it can destabilize the entire computer.
We should not use dishonest tactics to destabilize competitors, or manipulative communications that verge on propaganda.
But as briefly as you can, why would the Sudanese government want to destabilize Chad?
